Our Services

for Small Business

Data Center

Managed IT Services

Proactive monitoring, support, and maintenance to keep your systems running smoothly — 24/7, without the headaches.

Learn more →

Cloud & Server Management

We manage your cloud environments, servers, and infrastructure so you can focus on running your business, not your tech stack.

Learn more →

Cybersecurity

Advanced protection against modern threats, using enterprise-grade tools and practices typically reserved for large corporations.

Learn more →

Onsite + Remote Support

Unlike others, we include onsite support at no additional cost. Real hands-on help, right when and where you need it.

Learn more →
AI Adoption

How AI Enhances Every Layer of Your Business

Seamlessly weave intelligence through your entire enterprise stack, from edge monitoring to executive decision-making.

Step 01

Detect

Cloud Monitoring focusing on real-time identification of network anomalies and performance dips.

Step 02

Analyze

Cybersecurity layers utilizing deep behavioral analysis to isolate sophisticated zero-day threats.

Step 03

Automate

Support Automation through intelligent ticketing and instant NLP-driven resolution engines.

Step 04

Secure

Predictive Maintenance for preemptive hardening of systems before failures occur.

Step 05

Optimize

Workflow Optimization focusing on enterprise-wide efficiency gains and resource allocation.

+32% Efficiency
The Executive IT Framework

Our AI doesn't just surface problems—it resolves them before they impact your bottom line. We provide a comprehensive visibility layer that spans from bare-metal servers to the user experience.

  • Unified Threat Intelligence
  • Zero-Latency Automated Response
  • Enterprise-Wide Cost Optimization
Why Interia

The Best of
Both Worlds

Most IT providers are either expensive enterprise firms or limited small vendors. We bridge the gap — delivering big-firm expertise with local, personal service.

  • Enterprise-Level Expertise

    Real industry leaders with Fortune 500 experience, serving your local business.

  • Local Las Vegas Presence

    Hands-on onsite support from a team that knows your city, your market, your needs.

  • No Hidden Fees

    Transparent, predictable pricing. No surprise charges. Ever.

  • Built for Tech-Reliant Businesses

    Designed for companies where downtime is not an option and performance is everything.

Industries

Technology, security, and cloud solutions tailored to how your sector operates — so your teams stay focused on what matters most.

Small and Midsize Business

Helping growing businesses streamline operations, improve productivity, and accelerate digital transformation.

Cloud & Automation

Optimizing business workflows through intelligent cloud infrastructure and automated operational solutions.

Empowering Diverse Industries

Delivering tailored technology solutions that drive innovation, efficiency, and growth across diverse sectors.

Gaming

Delivering scalable and immersive technology solutions designed for modern gaming platforms and interactive experiences.

Security and Surveillance

Providing advanced monitoring, surveillance, and security solutions for safer and smarter environments.

Hospitality

Empowering hospitality businesses with seamless digital experiences, smart operations, and enhanced guest engagement solutions.

Health Care

Enabling healthcare providers with secure, efficient, and patient-focused digital systems for better care delivery.

Let our experts take a comprehensive look at your current IT infrastructure. We'll identify vulnerabilities, inefficiencies, and opportunities — then give you a clear, honest report. No strings attached.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Scale your IT infrastructure with confidence. We provide enterprise-grade managed services with no hidden fees, tailored for growth-oriented organizations.

Core

Basics for small teams

$ 499 /month
  • 24/7 Monitoring
  • Standard Backup (Daily)
  • Up to 10 Endpoints
  • Next-Day On-Site Support
  • Wired & Wireless Network Support
  • Firewall Support - Upto 2 Firewalls
  • 4-Hour Response SLA
Select Core
Most Popular

Secure

Enhanced protection & support

$ 1,299 /month
  • Everything in Core
  • Advanced Threat Protection
  • Cloud Backup (Real-time)
  • 2-Hour Response SLA
  • Dedicated Account Manager
Start with Secure

Premium

Full-scale enterprise IT

$ 3,499 /month
  • Everything in Secure
  • Full Disaster Recovery Plan
  • Compliance Management
  • Upto 20 Endpoints
  • Upto 5 Servers
  • 15-Minutes Response SLA
Talk to Enterprise

Infrastructure Add-Ons

Specific pricing for servers, cloud environments, and physical locations.

Server Pricing

Standard Server $150/mo
Critical Server $350/mo

Includes patching, backup, and 24/7 uptime monitoring.

Cloud Pricing

Per Tenant $250/mo
Cloud Management 5–10%/spend

Comprehensive management for Azure, AWS, and GCP instances.

Network/Site

Per Location $299/mo

Full site management including firewalls, switches, and APs.

Who We Are

About
Interia Technologies

Interia Technologies was founded with one purpose: to make world-class IT accessible to every business in Las Vegas, regardless of size. We saw a gap — small businesses were either overpaying for enterprise firms that didn't understand their scale, or underserved by IT vendors who lacked the depth to handle real challenges.

We built a team of true industry leaders — professionals who've worked inside the largest enterprise environments in the country — and redirected that expertise toward businesses that need it most: the ambitious, growing companies right here in the Las Vegas Valley.

Our Mission

To empower Las Vegas businesses with enterprise-grade technology solutions, delivered with the personal attention and transparency that only a local partner can provide.

Our Vision

A Las Vegas where every growing business operates with the same technological edge as the world's largest corporations — where technology becomes a strategic advantage, not a daily burden.

Born and based in Las Vegas, NV. Our team lives here, works here, and is invested in the success of this community. When you partner with Interia, you're not calling a remote help desk — you're calling your neighbors.
Get In Touch
